form.formComment: Has won previously first-up and resumes here after a break of four-and-a-half months. Finished off last preparation fourth of 11 at this track November 23 over 1275m, 2.25 len behind Starboy carrying 57kg at $4.40. When resuming last campaign eighth of 12 at this track July 6 over 1150m, 8 len behind Sky Eight with 55.5kg at $10. A big run will not surprise.
